name: oatpad
description: Read your Oatpad meetings: list them, fetch one by id, or pull every meeting in a date range.
long_description: Reads `.oats` meeting files written by the Oatpad macOS app from its application data directory and exposes them as MCP tools. Read-only — the bundle never writes back to disk.

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: List every Oatpad meeting, newest first.

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Retrieve a single Oatpad meeting by id.

tools.name: get_meetings_in_range
tools.description: Retrieve every Oatpad meeting whose createdAt falls within an ISO 8601 datetime range.
